title: senecio cinerarius
intro: Senecio cinerarius, also known as Gray Ragwort, is a perennial plant species native to Europe, particularly found in mountainous regions. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio cinerarius include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestion. The herbal preparations of Senecio cinerarius typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and roots, which are used to create teas, tinctures, or salves for various health purposes.
